_comment: Pre-approved SonarCloud hotspot allowlist for ThumbGate.
Each entry marks a specific (filePath, ruleKey, lineSubstring) triple as
REVIEWED / SAFE when SonarCloud detects it. The auto-reviewer script
(scripts/sonar-review-hotspots.js) runs in CI between the Sonar scan
and the Quality Gate check; the gate's new_security_hotspots_reviewed
metric passes once every hotspot is reviewed. Changes to this file
should be reviewed in PR like any other security policy change.

reviews.rationale: Installer MUST resolve git via the developer's own PATH. Git ships from many locations (brew, apt, scoop, Xcode, Git-for-Windows); pinning an absolute path would break every machine. The command literal ('git') is hard-coded, not user input, and args is always an array, so no shell interpolation is possible. Reviewed 2026-04-21.
